description: Set-digest function sorts members before hashing for an order-independent fingerprint; siblings do not.
inspired_by: ETag computation over unordered result sets

findings.rationale: digestMembers shares the shape of digestTags and digestLabels but sorts before hashing. The sort makes the digest order-independent, which is what lets it key a dedup cache. Remove it and the same set in a different order hashes differently, silently breaking deduplication.
